name: killhouse
description: A rigorous, unforgiving AI pipeline where code is planned, tested, and audited without mercy.

interface.shortDescription: Run code changes through a strict planning, TDD, and review pipeline.
interface.longDescription: Killhouse orchestrates triage, grilling, PRD writing, spec audit, planning, prompt evolution, TDD implementation, code review, and architecture review for AI coding agents.
defaultPrompt: Plan and implement this with Killhouse
